intel.text: Agent commerce narrative peaked this week — CashClaw (340K views), Slash for Agents (391K views), Greg Isenberg (166K views). Launch window is NOW.
Brian Armstrong: 'Very soon there will be more AI agents than humans making transactions. They can't open a bank account but they can own a wallet.' — 3.5M views. Direct FC thesis validation.
Whop effective fee ~6.3% vs our 2.5%. At $10K/month, seller saves $4,200/year with For Crypto.
agency-agents repo: 17.1K GitHub stars in 7 days from ONE Reddit post + Greg Isenberg RT. Reddit launch pattern confirmed for FC.
WJP 'Pay attention.' post: 12.2% like rate — highest of any studied account. Community already calling it 'Season 2.'
